insights.title: Dot-ball pressure told a story
insights.body: Delhi Daredevils faced 36% dot balls — fewer scoring opportunities usually means a harder innings in T20 cricket.

insights.title: Death overs defined the tempo
insights.body: Delhi Daredevils scored at 9.2 runs per over in overs 16–20, 17% dots in that phase.
